hero.badge: Open Data • OCDS • Fiscal Data Package
hero.title: Where does Moldova's public money go?
hero.subtitle: Explore the state budget, public procurement, and government contracts — all in one place, continuously updated and completely free.

features.title: What you can do on this platform
features.subtitle: Tools for citizens, journalists, and researchers

budget.title: Budget Explorer
budget.desc: Visualize budget allocations by sector, track trends from 2019 to present, and compare approved versus executed budgets.

procurement.title: Public Procurement
procurement.desc: Search and analyze procedures from MTender — active tenders, awarded contracts, contracting authorities, and suppliers.

openData.title: Open Data
openData.desc: Download raw data in CSV, JSON, or OCDS format. Documented public API for integration with other systems.

alerts.title: Alerts & Monitoring
alerts.desc: Subscribe to alerts for new tenders in your areas of interest or relevant budget changes.

highlights.title: Recent Highlights
highlights.budgetGrowthDesc: Moldova's state budget grew from 62 bn MDL in 2019 to 100 bn MDL in 2024, a 61% increase in nominal terms.
highlights.obsImprovementDesc: Moldova rose from 47th to 5th place globally in the Open Budget Survey between 2017 and 2023.
highlights.mtenderDesc: From 2018 to 2024, the MTender platform processed over 385,000 procedures worth a total of 113 bn MDL.

cta.title: This platform is open source
cta.subtitle: Source code is available on GitHub under the EUPL-1.2 license. Contributions are welcome.

budget.title: Budget Explorer
budget.subtitle: Analyze budget allocations by functional sector, track trends, and compare approved versus executed budgets.

treemap.title: Distribution by Sector
treemap.subtitle: Click on a sector for details

budget.source: Source: Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Moldova, World Bank BOOST

procurement.title: Public Procurement
procurement.subtitle: Data from MTender platform — the national e-procurement system, compliant with OCDS 1.1.
procurement.noResults: No results found for your search.
procurement.source: Source: MTender – Public Procurement System of the Republic of Moldova (OCDS 1.1)

about.title: About the Platform
about.subtitle: Open Budget Moldova is an initiative of Cohesion Lab — Laboratory for Civic Technology and Social Cohesion.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: We believe budget transparency is not a luxury — it is a fundamental right. Our platform makes budget and public procurement data accessible to any citizen, journalist, or researcher, without technical or legal barriers.

mtender.title: MTender
mtender.desc: National e-procurement system, OCDS 1.1 compliant. Daily updates via official API.

mof.title: Ministry of Finance
mof.desc: Monthly budget execution data, state budget law, and Citizens' Budget.

boost.title: BOOST Moldova
boost.desc: World Bank public expenditure database with multidimensional classification.

ccrm.title: Court of Accounts
ccrm.desc: Financial and compliance audit reports for public institutions.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.text: Data is collected via the MTender API and processed to ensure consistency and accuracy. Budget classification follows the UN COFOG standard (Classification of the Functions of Government). Procurement data complies with the OCDS 1.1 standard (Open Contracting Data Standard).

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.text: The platform source code is published on GitHub under the EUPL-1.2 (European Union Public Licence). Data is available under CC0 (public domain). Contributions are welcome.

footer.description: Budget transparency platform for Moldova, built by Cohesion Lab.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Cohesion Lab. Open source under EUPL-1.2.
